name: Cochise
description_short: Cochise Credit Union is a federally insured credit union in Willcox, Arizona, offering savings accounts, checking accounts, loans, and VISA cards to members.
description_long:
Cochise Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative based in Willcox, Arizona, with a physical location at 580 N. Haskell. The institution has been operating for at least 68 years, as evidenced by their 2026 Annual Meeting being their 68th. As a credit union, it operates under federal oversight with NMLS 789579 and maintains member deposits federally insured to at least $250,000 by the NCUA.

Cochise Credit Union offers a comprehensive range of financial products including share savings accounts (regular savings at 0.10% APY, Christmas Club at 0.15%, and IRA accounts at 0.40%), Money Market Accounts with tiered rates ($1.87-2.38% depending on balance), and Certificate of Deposit accounts ranging from 6-60 months (3.66-3.76% APY). On the lending side, they provide secured auto loans (5.00% APR for new autos), unsecured personal loans (9.50% APR), home equity loans, and MasterCard credit products (9.90% APR). Members also have access to VISA debit cards, VISA prepaid cards, VISA credit cards with rewards programs, share draft checking accounts, overdraft protection up to $1,000, mobile banking, online bill pay, and mobile remote deposit capture (RDC).

Cochise distinguishes itself as a community-focused financial institution that actively engages members through programs like their National Credit Union Youth Month coloring contests and online annual meetings. They offer personalized support with direct phone access during business hours (Monday-Thursday 9 AM-4 PM, Friday 9 AM-6 PM) and 24/7 card support. The institution actively communicates security awareness to members, including detailed fraud alerts about spoofing and guidance on protecting personal information. Their membership structure aligns them with credit union values of member ownership rather than shareholder profit maximization.

As a small regional credit union, Cochise serves a limited geographic area and member base compared to larger national banks or credit unions. While they offer competitive rates on certain products (particularly CDs at 3.66-3.76%), their savings rates are notably below current market averages. The limited branch presence and local-only membership eligibility may restrict accessibility for consumers outside the Willcox, Arizona area. Prospective members should verify membership eligibility requirements, which are typical for credit unions but may restrict who can join. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Christmas Club savings account at 0.15% APY
Certificate of Deposit accounts (6-60 months, 3.66-3.76% APY)
Money Market Accounts with tiered rates ($1.87-2.38% APY)
Share Draft checking accounts with overdraft protection up to $1,000
VISA debit cards with ATM access and Verified by Visa security
VISA credit cards with ScoreCard Rewards program
Online banking, bill pay, and mobile banking with remote deposit capture
pros: NCUA federal insurance protection up to $250,000 per depositor category
Competitive CD rates ranging from 3.66-3.76% APY for 18-60 month terms
Overdraft protection up to $1,000 available to protect credit and increase borrowing power
24/7 customer support for VISA debit card issues via 1-866-498-2269
Mobile banking and remote deposit capture (RDC) for digital convenience
Member-owned credit union structure with annual shareholder voting at 68-year-old institution
Fraud alert and spoofing protection education with clear security guidelines
cons: Savings account rates are very low (0.10-0.40% APY) compared to online bank alternatives and current market rates
Limited geographic footprint with single physical location in Willcox, Arizona, restricting accessibility
Membership eligibility restrictions typical of credit unions may exclude consumers outside served communities
Unsecured personal loan APR of 9.50% and MasterCard APR of 9.90% are higher than many credit union alternatives
New auto loan rate of 5.00% is not particularly competitive compared to current credit union auto lending rates
best_for: Local Willcox, Arizona residents seeking community-based banking with NCUA insurance protection
Savers interested in CD laddering with fixed rates above 3.6% APY
Credit union members prioritizing overdraft protection and fraud monitoring capabilities
Consumers valuing member ownership and local customer service availability
diagnosis: Cochise Credit Union is best for Willcox, Arizona residents seeking NCUA-insured banking with community connection and competitive CD rates. The main caveat is that this is a small regional institution with limited branch presence and above-market loan rates; consumers outside the Willcox area should verify membership eligibility before applying.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
